zh.lifeSummary: Jane於1570年出生在英國。她於大約1594年與Richard Fawdry在英國英格蘭奧可福爾恩斯同結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Jane于1570年出生在英国。她于大约1594年与Richard Fawdry在英国英格兰奧可福爾恩斯同结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: Jane was born in 1570, in England. She married Richard Fawdry about 1594, in Enstone, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Jane est née en 1570, à Angleterre. Elle a épousé Richard Fawdry environ 1594, à Enstone, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Jane wurde 1570 in England geboren. Sie hat um 1594 in Enstone, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Richard Fawdry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Jane è nata il nel 1570 nel England. Lei sposato Richard Fawdry circa 1594, nel Enstone, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie.

ja.Enstone, Oxfordshire, England: イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアエンストーン
ja.lifeSummary: Janeは1570年にイギリスで生まれた。約1594年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアエンストーンでRichard Fawdryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane(은)는 1570년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1594년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스톤에서 Richard Fawdry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Jane nasceu em 1570, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Richard Fawdry aproximadamente 1594, em Enstone, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Jane родилась в 1570 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Fawdry около 1594 г. в местности энстоун, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Jane nació en 1570, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Richard Fawdry aproximadamente 1594, en Enstone, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas.
